relatedness_reasoning: While both files involve customer data and originate from risk_and_compliance, the inbound file is a complaint escalation for fraud/compliance review, whereas the outbound file is a KYC refresh request sent to a credit department. The outbound file requires customer PII (date_of_birth, national_id) and KYC-specific fields (last_refresh_date, PEP_STATUS_VERIFICATION) that are not present in the inbound complaint escalation schema. The business purposes are fundamentally different: one is incident-driven compliance escalation, the other is routine identity verification. No clear data transformation pipeline connects these two message types.
